title: GATE Memory Response Envelope
description: Memory Gateway response envelope. v1.3 adds quality_flags and quality_decision_id so downstream consumers (agent runtime, prompt template, C13 trace) can honour the C18 quality decision.

status.description: Aggregate status. 'denied' reflects a hard deny from any boundary (ACL, poisoning, C18 quality gate). 'downgraded' reflects a partial response per the C18 action matrix.

items.description: memory_item shape, with optional quality_flags attached per item.

quality_flags.description: Aggregate flags across the returned items. Downstream consumers MUST honour these.

quality_decision_id.description: Foreign key to the originating gate.memory.quality_decision event. Required for retrievals at bounded or high-privilege tier.
